title: MUIS Zakat Financial Assistance
text:
MUIS Zakat Financial Assistance - SupportGoWhere
MUIS Zakat Financial Assistance
Share link
Provides monthly financial assistance and support in other forms to eligible low-income Muslim households.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
Monthly financial assistance for eligible individuals
Support for emergency needs and burial expenses
Study grants and food vouchers available
Assessment based on Per Capita Income of $500 or lower for eligibility
Collapse all sections
About this support

Potential benefits include:  

Monthly financial support: Dependent on Per Capita Income (PCI) criteria 

Settlement of debt: One-time settlement of arrears for basic necessities (utility and conservancy charges)

Emergency assistance: Renders emergency assistance in times of crisis such as natural disasters, fire, or accidents

Burial expenses: Covers burial expenses incurred upon death of a Zakat beneficiary and their immediate family members

Study grants: Subsidies for national examinations mosque-based part-time Islamic education, and low-income students with special needs

Fidyah food vouchers: To purchase food supplies at approved Fidyah retailers islandwide

Who is this for?

Available to Muslim Singapore Citizens and Permanent Residents 

Per Capita Income (PCI) must be $500 or lower to qualify 

Applicants will undergo an assessment interview with a Social Development Officer (SDO) at the nearest Social Development (SD) mosque

Required documents: NRIC, birth certificate, income and bank documents, and other relevant supporting documents 

Outcome notified by mail within up to 6 weeks 

How to apply?

Call a Social Development (SD) mosque closest to your home for an appointment. 

Schedule an assessment interview with an SDO. 

During the interview, please prepare to bring your personal identification documents, such as NRIC and birth certificate, income and bank documents (payslips, CPF statements, bank books etc.), and other relevant supporting documents (bills, medical memos, referral letters etc.) to help verify your application 

Where can I find help?

View more details

MUIS Hotline: 6359 1199

Submit an enquiry

Visit your nearest SD mosque

Scheme last updated 09 Dec 2025
SUPPORT RECOMMENDER
Answer a few questions to find schemes and services you may be eligible for.
